productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Brown and Red Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 21 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 12 cmMade of blended fabric for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleZipper pocket at the back for additional space                                    Metallic embellishment with brand name on the frontRemovable cross metallic chain in the front                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Buckles design on the front for styleLegs at baseCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
